name: Feud Angle
description: Storyline developments that drive ongoing rivalries and generate dramatic twists

entries.templateText: {WRESTLER_1} hits {WRESTLER_2} with a steel chair during a tag team match, shattering their alliance in front of a stunned arena.
{WRESTLER_1} leaves {WRESTLER_2} alone in the ring to be systematically destroyed by a rival stable, walking up the ramp with a smirk.
{WRESTLER_1} grabs a microphone and reveals they only teamed with {WRESTLER_2} to keep them away from the championship picture.
During a victory celebration, {WRESTLER_1} blindsides {WRESTLER_2}, hitting their finisher and throwing their merchandise into the crowd.
{WRESTLER_1} secretly cuts a deal behind the back of {WRESTLER_2}, resulting in {WRESTLER_2} losing their contract or title opportunity.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the previously injured limb of {WRESTLER_2} during what was supposed to be a friendly exhibition match.
{WRESTLER_2} extends a hand in mutual respect, but {WRESTLER_1} spits in their face and delivers a low blow.
{WRESTLER_1} takes a bribe from a rival faction to completely eliminate {WRESTLER_2} from an upcoming high-stakes battle royal.
{WRESTLER_1} convinces the tag team partner of {WRESTLER_2} to turn on them, leaving {WRESTLER_2} completely isolated in the locker room.
{WRESTLER_1} reveals they have been the anonymous mastermind behind the recent string of backstage attacks on {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} saves {WRESTLER_2} from a brutal post-match beatdown, shocking the crowd and signaling an unexpected alliance.
{WRESTLER_2} offers an alliance to {WRESTLER_1} against a common enemy, and {WRESTLER_1} reluctantly nods, sealing it with a tense handshake.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} find themselves forced to team up by management, discovering an eerie, high-impact chemical synergy in the ring.
{WRESTLER_1} clears the ring to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with {WRESTLER_2} as an invading faction tries to take over the show.
{WRESTLER_1} buys out the contract of an indy standout, establishing a powerful new mentorship alliance over {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} steps into the line of fire to take a weapon shot meant for {WRESTLER_2}, establishing a powerful baseline of trust.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} exchange a silent, respectful look after surviving a brutal multi-man ladder match together.
{WRESTLER_1} rescues the family member of {WRESTLER_2} from an aggressive backstage interview, earning unexpected gratitude.
{WRESTLER_1} invites {WRESTLER_2} into their exclusive inner circle, offering them a level of protection they desperately need.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} cut a joint promo, vowing to put aside their historic blood feud to clean up a corrupt locker room.
{WRESTLER_1} makes deeply personal comments regarding the legendary wrestling family of {WRESTLER_2}, calling them a disgrace to the legacy.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the real-life physical limitations or age of {WRESTLER_2}, mocking their dream of one last championship run.
{WRESTLER_1} defaces a historic trophy or championship belt belonging to {WRESTLER_2}, throwing it into a trash can live on television.
{WRESTLER_1} brings up an embarrassing, untelevised training incident from years ago to completely humiliate {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the hometown crowd of {WRESTLER_2}, insulting their way of life to draw a massive visceral reaction from the audience.
{WRESTLER_1} breaks into the private locker room of {WRESTLER_2}, destroying their personal belongings and leaving a threatening note.
{WRESTLER_1} interrupts a heartfelt retirement tribute or hall of fame announcement for {WRESTLER_2} with mocking laughter.
{WRESTLER_1} claims that {WRESTLER_2} only got their job due to backstage politics and nepotism rather than actual talent.
{WRESTLER_1} corners the real-life spouse or partner of {WRESTLER_2} at ringside, using them as a human shield during a tense confrontation.
{WRESTLER_1} tracks down {WRESTLER_2} at a local gym or training facility, turning a private workout into a highly personal brawl.
{WRESTLER_1} ambushes {WRESTLER_2} in the parking lot, throwing them into the side of a production truck before security can intervene.
{WRESTLER_1} attacks {WRESTLER_2} from behind during their entrance, hitting a devastating suplex directly onto the cold steel ramp.
{WRESTLER_1} uses a hidden foreign object to blindside {WRESTLER_2} during a commercial break, leaving them bleeding in the center of the ring.
{WRESTLER_1} attacks {WRESTLER_2} with a heavy camera tripod during a routine backstage interview segment.
{WRESTLER_1} pulls the referee in front of a spear from {WRESTLER_2}, then uses the chaos to deliver a brutal, unpunished low blow.
{WRESTLER_1} traps the ankle of {WRESTLER_2} inside a folding steel chair and leaps off the second rope, looking to break the limb.
{WRESTLER_1} puts {WRESTLER_2} through the announcer's table with a high-flying driving maneuver after the closing bell has already rung.
{WRESTLER_1} chokes out {WRESTLER_2} using a stray television cable until locker room officials storm the ring to pull them away.
{WRESTLER_1} hides among the arena security staff, revealing themselves at the last second to initiate a fierce, unexpected beatdown on {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} attacks {WRESTLER_2} in the catering area, throwing them through a heavily laden table in front of horrified locker room peers.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} are separated by a massive wall of thirty security guards before a single physical blow can be landed.
{WRESTLER_1} exits the ring and walks away from a tense confrontation, completely ignoring the heated challenges of {WRESTLER_2}.
An elder statesman of the business steps in to mediate a brewing locker room war between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} agree to a temporary truce to ensure their upcoming high-profile multi-man match isn't completely ruined.
A massive pull-apart brawl between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} ends with both men cooling down in separate local law enforcement holding cells.
{WRESTLER_1} offers a public, corporate apology to {WRESTLER_2} under intense pressure from the promotion's legal department.
{WRESTLER_2} tries to ambush {WRESTLER_1}, but {WRESTLER_1} anticipates the move, slipping out the side door just in time.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} sign a strict, legally binding contract prohibiting them from touching each other until the scheduled pay-per-view.
A technical glitch or arena power outage cuts off a highly volatile ring confrontation between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} chooses to pay a hefty financial fine to management rather than face {WRESTLER_2} in an unsanctioned street fight tonight.
{WRESTLER_1} uses an exclusive contract loophole to strip {WRESTLER_2} of their number one contender status.
{WRESTLER_1} hires a high-priced corporate legal team to file a restraining order against {WRESTLER_2}, barring them from the building.
{WRESTLER_1} forces {WRESTLER_2} to sign a humiliating contract stipulating that if {WRESTLER_2} loses, they must leave the territory forever.
{WRESTLER_1} buys out the lucrative merchandise rights of {WRESTLER_2}, effectively controlling all of their career revenue streams.
{WRESTLER_1} offers {WRESTLER_2} a massive, life-changing sum of cash to simply lay down and throw their upcoming title match.
{WRESTLER_1} orchestrates a complex corporate buyout of the training school where {WRESTLER_2} originally learned the wrestling business.
{WRESTLER_1} leverages a private bounty contract, offering cash to any wrestler who can successfully take out {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} manipulates the official rules, adding a highly dangerous, career-threatening stipulation to their match with {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} holds the active contract of {WRESTLER_2} over their head, forcing them to act as a personal, subservient locker room servant.
{WRESTLER_1} uses political leverage with TV executives to cut off the live broadcast signal right as {WRESTLER_2} begins an explosive exposé.
{WRESTLER_1} rejects the cheers of the crowd, kicking a fan's sign and declaring that the audience is completely unworthy of their talent.
{WRESTLER_1} undergoes a profound crisis of conscience, refusing to use a steel chair offered by a corrupt manager to finish a match.
{WRESTLER_1} adopts a completely new, sinister, dark persona, abandoning all previous moral codes to achieve victory.
{WRESTLER_1} snaps after a frustrating loss, laying out the referee and local ringside staff in an unhinged, violent breakdown.
{WRESTLER_1} cuts a deeply emotional promo about sacrificing their family life for the business, showing a raw, human side.
{WRESTLER_1} embraces an ultra-patriotic or localized persona, instantly cementing themselves as a massive regional favorite.
{WRESTLER_1} aligns with an infamous, manipulative manager, selling out their long-held core values for a shot at true gold.
{WRESTLER_1} breaks down in tears after a hard-fought match, finally earning the true, undying respect of the wrestling locker room.
{WRESTLER_1} targets a beloved, defenseless veteran trainer backstage, proving they will cross any moral line to get noticed.
{WRESTLER_1} boldly vacates a secondary title, stating they have completely outgrown it and are moving on to much bigger targets.
The crowd completely hijacks a live in-ring promo by {WRESTLER_1}, chanting the name of {WRESTLER_2} so loudly that the segment is derailed.
A group of rowdy fans at ringside hands a weapon to {WRESTLER_2}, allowing them to successfully repel an aggressive attack from {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} tries to jump the guardrail to attack a fan, but {WRESTLER_2} storms out of the back to prevent a massive disaster.
The entire live arena audience turns their backs on {WRESTLER_1} during their entrance, executing a highly organized, eerie silent protest.
Fans throw trash into the ring as {WRESTLER_1} stands victoriously over a broken, battered, and completely defenseless {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} gets heavily mobbed by enthusiastic fans during a spectacular crowd-surfing entrance, infuriating a watching {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} destroys a handmade sign held by a young fan in the front row, drawing an immediate, intense wave of nuclear heat.
The arena crowd initiates a deafening, stadium-wide standing ovation for {WRESTLER_2} following a deeply heartbreaking, narrow loss.
{WRESTLER_1} uses a plant in the live audience to trip {WRESTLER_2} during a crucial, high-stakes over-the-top-rope dive.
The crowd organizes a massive, thunderous arena chant that exposes a deeply embarrassing secret regarding the past of {WRESTLER_1}.
The General Manager forces {WRESTLER_1} to defend their coveted championship against {WRESTLER_2} in tonight's main event.
{WRESTLER_1} is caught on a hot mic plotting with the corrupt promotion Commissioner to completely screw {WRESTLER_2} out of a title.
The Authority Figure suspends {WRESTLER_1} indefinitely for their unchecked, violent backstage conduct against {WRESTLER_2}.
The corporate board strips {WRESTLER_1} of their executive power, instantly leveling the playing field for a grateful {WRESTLER_2}.
An aggressive Authority Figure bans the signature finishing maneuver of {WRESTLER_2}, heavily favoring {WRESTLER_1} in their upcoming bout.
The General Manager assigns a highly biased special guest referee to ensure {WRESTLER_1} retains their title against {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} produces a secret corporate document that completely overrules the unfair match stipulations set by {WRESTLER_1}.
The Authority Figure forces {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} to participate in a mandatory, highly tense corporate couples counseling segment.
Management locks {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} inside a steel cage together, refusing to let them out until a contract is signed.
The promotion's owner personally reverses a corrupt referee decision, awarding a hard-fought, emotional victory back to {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} leaks private, highly compromising locker room text messages from {WRESTLER_2} to a major online wrestling dirt sheet.
{WRESTLER_2} posts an explosive, unedited training video on social media, completely exposing the flawed defensive strategy of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} hijacks a high-profile sports morning talk show, completely trashing the athletic reputation of {WRESTLER_2} on live network TV.
A viral podcaster releases a tell-all audio interview detailing a toxic, long-hidden backstage history between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} cuts an intense, unauthorized live stream promo from the actual front yard of the private home of {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} appears unexpectedly on a rival promotion's broadcast, openly mocking the creative direction and leadership of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} pays for a massive, highly insulting promotional billboard directly outside the local wrestling school run by {WRESTLER_2}.
A heavily edited, highly damaging hype video package airs, making {WRESTLER_2} look completely foolish while glorifying {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} brings an award-winning mainstream Hollywood celebrity to ringside to completely overshadow the big moment of {WRESTLER_2}.
An anonymous whistleblower sends a massive cache of highly incriminating video files detailing years of cheating by {WRESTLER_1} directly to {WRESTLER_2}.
